title: gMSA Managed Password Read Attempt
description: Detects attempts to read the msDS-ManagedPassword blob of a group Managed Service Account (gMSA), allowing computation of the account's NTLM hash. Tools include GMSAPasswordReader and Get-ADServiceAccount -Properties msDS-ManagedPassword. GOAD exposes gmsaDragon as a gMSA read target.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*msDS-ManagedPassword*' or 'Command Line' like '*GMSAPasswordReader*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ADServiceAccount*' or 'Command Line' like '*ConvertFrom-ADManagedPasswordBlob*')))
